positive: A minimalist, stylized forest scene print. Central composition featuring abstract silhouettes of intertwined redwood trees and woodland fauna (deer, fox, owl). Use strong, graphic contrast with deep indigo and earthy teal tones against an off-white background. The style should be inspired by sophisticated woodblock print techniques (Ukiyo-e influence, but modern and geometric), emphasizing clean lines, bold negative space, and symmetrical balance. The overall feeling should be serene, mystical, and effortlessly cool, suitable for all seasons apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, cartoon, photographic, gradient background, messy, noisy, extra limbs, ugly, grain
